query:
SELECT vt.slug, vt.label, COUNT(dvt.id) as doc_count 
FROM document_violation_tags dvt
JOIN violation_tags vt ON dvt.violation_tag_id = vt.id
GROUP BY vt.id, vt.slug, vt.label
ORDER BY doc_count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2N1WTErRdSjheBh.e46440e12186 --database 3yhU3DrKzf8Z5BNtvxatFF --execute SELECT vt.slug, vt.label, COUNT(dvt.id) as doc_count 
FROM document_violation_tags dvt
JOIN violation_tags vt ON dvt.violation_tag_id = vt.id
GROUP BY vt.id, vt.slug, vt.label
ORDER BY doc_count DESC;
